ingredients_text: 44% Cooked Pilau Rice (Water, Basmati Rice, Butter (Milk), Cumin Seeds, Salt, Ground Turmeric), 36% Tikka Masala Sauce (Single Cream (Milk), Water, Onion, Concentrated Tomato Purée, Onion Purée, Rapeseed Oil, GarlicC Purée, Ginger Purée, Sugar, Cashew Purée, Tandoori Masala Powder [Ground Coriander, lodised Salt (Salt, lodine), Ground Cumin, Ground Cinnamon, Sugar, Ground Chilli, Dried Lemon Juice, Ground Celery, Ground Cardamom, Dried Garlic, Dried Onion, Ground Black Pepper, Ground Ginger, Ground Bay Leaf, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Ground Clove, Ground Fenugreek, Colours: Paprika Extract, Curcumin; Natural Lemon Flavouring, Salt, Green Chilli Purée, Coriander, Ground Coriander, Cornflour, Dried Turmeric, Dried Cumin, Dried Chilli, Garam Masala [Ground Coriander, Ground Cumin, Ground Ginger, Ground Cassia, Ground Black Pepper, Ground Cloves], Ground Fenugreek Leaf, Lemon Oil), 20% Cooked Chicken Tikka Pieces (95% Chicken Breast, Dextrose, Sugar, Ground Spices [Coriander, Cumin, Cayenne, Black Pepper, Allspice], Dried Tomato, Cornflour, Dried Whey (Milk), Thickening Agent: Guar Gum; Dried Garlic, Salt, Beetroot Extract, Paprika Extract, Turmeric Extract, Dried Coriander, Dried Parsley, Flavouring).
